title: Integrating Global Shop databases
excerpt: Does anyone know how to integrate a connection to Global Shop Solutions?  We use this ERP and house the program on an in-house server.  Currently we are importing information manually each week.

posts.author: JHolden1975 (Jason Holden)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone know how to integrate a connection to Global Shop Solutions? We use this ERP and house the program on an in-house server. Currently we are importing information manually each week.

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Jason Holden:

Global Shop Solutions

Does Global Shop supports APIs? if have APIs you can use make[dot]com
even if they don’t have APIs you can make this process automatic but then you need a developer to make that work

posts.author: dsellers-elward (David Sellers)
posts.cookedHtml: @JHolden1975 Hello! We are starting on monday.com and are trying to integrate Global Shop. Did you find a solution? If at all possible I would love to connect to learn about what you have discovered!

posts.author: WirkKarl (Karl)
posts.cookedHtml: Global Shop doesn’t have a native monday.com integration, so most teams handle this through the API or a middleware tool. If your ERP is on-prem, the usual approach is to expose the needed data via SQL or a secure API and then push it into monday using the monday.com API. Tools like Zapier, Make, or a custom script can automate the weekly import and remove the manual work.

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @JHolden1975
Hi! We ran into the same thing. There isn’t a built in Global Shop integration in monday, so we ended up using a middleware tool to bridge the two. In our case, pulling the data out of Global Shop and then pushing it into monday worked best and removed the manual updates.

If you’re just getting started, tools like Zapier or Make are usually the easiest path. If you need something more custom, monday’s API and webhooks give you a lot of flexibility. Happy to share more details on what we set up if you want to connect.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Monday Wizard
